rationale: The cited paper is topically related (online ratings and the informativeness of average ratings), so it could plausibly serve as background motivation for why rating signals matter in the citing study. However, the provided evidence is only a single DOI-matched reference with no citation context, and the cited paper’s core mechanism (polarity self-selection) does not clearly overlap with the citing paper’s focal mechanism (numerical vs. analog format and left-digit anchoring).
